codeReview.summary: Implementation fully covers the feature requirements. AutonomousCoverageLoop orchestrates the closed-loop test generation: identify gap → generate test → run test → check coverage → repeat until threshold met or iteration limit reached. Two bugs were fixed: (1) operator precedence in run_mutation_testing checking RUST_TEST first, (2) termination logic using <= for proper edge case handling when improvement equals threshold. All 48 tests pass and clippy reports no warnings.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AutonomousCoverageLoop, CoverageLoopIteration, CoverageLoopResult, and AutonomousCoverageLoopConfig types are not documented in the swell-validation AGENTS.md. The AGENTS.md only mentions 'AutonomousCoverageEngine' but the new closed-loop functionality introduces additional public types that users of this crate would need to understand.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: crates/swell-validation/AGENTS.md lists 'AutonomousCoverageEngine' in the Key re-exports section but does not include AutonomousCoverageLoop, CoverageLoopIteration, CoverageLoopResult, or AutonomousCoverageLoopConfig. These types are exported from lib.rs and are part of the public API.

summary: Implementation passes review. The closed-loop test generation feature is fully implemented with proper termination logic (coverage threshold or iteration limit), test generation for identified gaps, and 48 passing tests. Two bugs were correctly fixed during implementation: operator precedence in RUST_TEST env var handling and termination logic edge case. Minor documentation gap: the new public types (AutonomousCoverageLoop, etc.) are not documented in AGENTS.md but this is non-blocking.
